posters.title: Modern Login Page Design
posters.author: Beginner
posters.des: Design a clean and modern login page for a mobile or web application. Focus on usability, accessibility, visual hierarchy, and creating a seamless authentication experience.
step_by_step: Design the app logo and welcome section
Add email and password input fields
Design loading, success, and error states

posters.title: Smart Home App Dashboard
posters.author: Advanced
posters.des: Design a dashboard for controlling smart home devices like lights, thermostats, and security cameras.
step_by_step: Define the core widgets needed on the dashboard
Create custom icons for each device type
Design an intuitive drag-and-drop customization flow
Add micro-interactions for toggling devices on and off
